name: Remnants Of The Witch
short_description: Follow the story of Mari, as she becomes a witch hunter and discovers what's really going on in Sthalgrave city. Use various skills in the fast-paced turn-based battles! Use free time after missions to hang out with teammates!
detailed_description:
Remnants Of The Witch is a story-heavy RPG game. It takes place in a magic-based 1930s-inspired setting.

Experience an emotional story 

The story follows Mari, who joins a witch-hunting organization to save her friend Annie. Experience her journey as she learns more about herself, her companions, and the world of witch-hunting she has entered. Joined by her comrades, she will embark on various missions to defeat the sudden appearance of the witch threat. 

However, some unforeseen complications will make her question her goals.

Spend time with squadmates

 

Spend quality time with your teammates, unlocking unique, powerful abilities for future missions. Understanding one another is important.

Use your limited time wisely.

Explore the city

Explore the city of sthalgrave, and watch the city change as the story progresses. Secrets lie everywhere, some even being side-stories with unique characters.

The city has much to offer.
